$comment: Layer B selection cases for SETTLE vs the real GnuCOBOL harness image (OCCURS affine subscripts + subscripted MOVE, docs/occurs.md). Four amounts are filled into a table by subscripted MOVE from NUMVAL, and the settlements (even positions, W-ITEM(2*I)) are summed with a 2% fee ROUNDED. Candidate B is off by one on the stride and sums the accruals (odd positions) instead; any ledger whose accruals differ from its settlements catches it. Cases cover a typical ledger, a rounding half-cent, accruals-only (must ignore them), and a zeroed ledger.

legacy.label: COBOL 85 SETTLE (GnuCOBOL via harness image legacymind/legacy-settle)
